expectations.text: The skill does NOT produce a retro when asked for a stakeholder update — status updates and retrospectives serve different audiences and purposes
expectations.evidence: Title is 'Not a Retrospective — Redirecting'. Explicitly states: 'You're asking for a stakeholder update, not a product retrospective. These are different workflows with different audiences and outputs.' Provides clear explanation of the difference. Does not produce a retrospective.
'For a stakeholder update, use /stakeholder-update — it's designed for executive communication with the right framing, level of detail, and format.'
